learnings.text: Google Drive download-file tool creates BOTH an original-named copy AND your specified filePath copy. Clean up originals after download to avoid duplicates.

Parallel /zo/ask generation with 15-semaphore concurrency works well for knowledge base files. 26 files generated in one batch with zero failures. Each child invocation needs full source content + clear voice guidelines + specific topic instructions to produce consistent output. Source: D2.1

DuckDB ON CONFLICT requires UNIQUE index, not regular index, on the conflict column. D3.3 drop brief specifies CREATE INDEX (non-unique) on caller_profiles.phone — D3.2 fixed to CREATE UNIQUE INDEX. Other drops consuming this table should ensure unique index exists.

Career coaching dataset has 6 tables (vs zo-hotline 5): added caller_profiles for Fillout intake. daily_analysis has career_stages_json, topics_json, careerspan_conversions columns. DB path: Datasets/career-coaching-calls/data.duckdb. Init: python3 Skills/career-coaching-hotline/scripts/init_db.py
